pr.title: Complexity MoE v4: Token-Routed I64 + PID + CUDA Scatter + Int6 (26.5M params)

output.summary: Token-routed 4-expert MoE with PID mu dynamics, CUDA scatter dispatch, int6+zstd compression, and SGDR scheduling to pack 26.5M params within the challenge budget.
techniques: Deterministic token_id % 4 routing for 4 SwiGLU experts
PID-style mu/velocity control threaded through every layer
SGDR cosine warm restarts plus CUDA scatter dispatch
